top_signals.title: Stellantis targets 35% North American sales increase, led by Ram Trucks and Chrysler revival
top_signals.summary: Stellantis said at an investor day Thursday that it plans to increase its North American sales by 35% by 2030.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Apple blocked over $11 billion in App Store fraud in 6 years
top_signals.summary: Apple revealed that it blocked over $11 billion in fraudulent App Store transactions over the last six years, more than $2.2 billion in potentially fraudulent App Store transactions in 2025 alone. [...]
